title: Communauté de communes du Pays Créçois
summary: The Communauté de communes du Pays Créçois is a former federation of municipalities (communauté de communes) in the Seine-et-Marne département and in the Île-de-France région of France. It was created in February 1992. It was disbanded in January 2020, when 12 of its communes joined the Communauté d'agglomération Coulommiers Pays de Brie.
text:
The Communauté de communes du Pays Créçois is a former federation of municipalities (communauté de communes) in the Seine-et-Marne département and in the Île-de-France région of France. It was created in February 1992. It was disbanded in January 2020, when 12 of its communes joined the Communauté d'agglomération Coulommiers Pays de Brie.

Composition
The communauté de communes consisted of the following 19 communes:
